news.t: A2GOLD COMPLETES ACQUISITION OF DISTRICT-SCALE TAYLOR SILVER-GOLD PROJECT IN NEVADA
Global X Expands Platform with Gold Miners ETF Launch

holdings.infoBox: AUAU is an equity ETF with a total of 108 individual holdings. The top holdings are Newmont stock at 12.72%, Agnico Eagle Mines at 9.47%, Barrick Mining at 7.64%, Wheaton Precious Metals at 6.28%, and AngloGold Ashanti at 5.10%.

overview.description: The Global X Gold Miners ETF (AUAU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NYSE Arca Gold Miners (NTR) index, a market-cap-weighted index of global gold and silver mining of any capitalization AUAU was launched on Dec 9, 2025 and is issued by Global X.
